title: Adding custom items to Working Status
excerpt: Our organization is attempting to use the Working Status features in Monday to track the current status of our workforce. It would be great if we had the ability to customize and add different tags that specifically appl…

posts.author: joseph.ponisi (Joseph Ponisi)
posts.cookedHtml: Our organization is attempting to use the Working Status features in Monday to track the current status of our workforce. It would be great if we had the ability to customize and add different tags that specifically apply to our organization.
